description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull Request Checks that runs on pull requests to the master and feature branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET SDKs (3.1.x, 5.0.x, 6.0.x, 7.0.x, 8.0.x, 9.0.x) and Node.js 18.x, then checks building with npm install and dotnet build, runs tests with npm lint and dotnet test for multiple .NET versions, and uploads coverage to Codecov using a token from secrets.
